title: polygala supina subsp. murbeckii
intro: Polygala supina subsp. murbeckii is a subspecies of the Polygala supina plant, belonging to the Milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat kidney and urinary system issues. The plant has been found to have diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of nephritis and cystitis. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions and decoctions made from the plant's leaves and roots, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
